subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, transcending the breaths of all the worlds, befitteth the Most Holy Court of that Beloved One, unto Whom all words [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از انفاس عالمیان ساحت اقدس حضرت محبوبی را لایق و سزاست که جمیع الفاظ
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
